summary: open-agents-ai postinstall daemon exfiltrates host data and runs network commands
details: The package ships dist/postinstall-daemon.cjs and wires it into both preinstall and postinstall lifecycle hooks in package.json. The daemon imports os, fs, http, and child_process, calls os.userInfo() and execSync(...) to collect host/identity information, performs http.request GETs, repeatedly invokes ping, and uses fs.existsSync to probe filesystem paths. package.json's lifecycle scripts also chain curl invocations directly. The combination of install-time lifecycle hooks + system-info collection (os.userInfo, execSync) + outbound HTTP + ping/curl commands is the canonical install-time host beacon / exfiltration shape, and there is no legitimate purpose for a package to ping arbitrary hosts and POST identity data on every install.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
